purpose: Shared template for portfolio evaluation code paths.
required_structure: consume precomputed factor signals whenever available
avoid recomputing factor expressions inside portfolio evaluation
keep portfolio evaluation semantically separate from factor generation
preferred_patterns: shared signal inputs from workflow cache or factor matrix
date-grouped portfolio logic operating on cached columns
discouraged_patterns: duplicating signal normalization logic across modules
acceptance_questions: Does portfolio use shared signal inputs?
Did optimization preserve turnover and cost semantics?
Can this logic be reused by multiple portfolio strategies?
